quantlab.name: Quant Lab System v4.0 Daily Report
quantlab.stale_reason: QuantLab-Marktdaten sind aktuell bis 2026-04-10; der Canonical-/Modell-Cutoff liegt bei 2026-04-10 und wird separat als advisory verfolgt.
quantlab.freshness_reason: QuantLab-Marktdaten sind aktuell bis 2026-04-10; der Canonical-/Modell-Cutoff liegt bei 2026-04-10 und wird separat als advisory verfolgt.
quantlab.pipeline_error: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

breakout_v2.name: Breakout V2
breakout_v2.stale_reason: Best-setups snapshot depends on data as-of 2026-04-10
breakout_v2.freshness_reason: Best-setups snapshot depends on data as-of 2026-04-10
breakout_v2.metric_na_reason: Breakout V2 has no standalone historical accuracy metric; evaluate via snapshot throughput and gate outcomes.

hist_probs.name: Historical Probabilities
hist_probs.metric_na_reason: Passive source; use regime date, freshness, and coverage instead of accuracy.

pipeline_diagnostic.explanation: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.

recommendations.text: Scientific Analyzer v9.1: accuracy below coin-flip (39.3%). Recalibration recommended.
Quant Lab System v4.0 Daily Report: accuracy below coin-flip (0.0%). Recalibration recommended.

status_detail: Control-plane artifacts disagree on target date or run identity

primary_actions.title: Automation refresh chain is degraded
primary_actions.impact: Automation can report failure even when some artifacts recovered, so operators need explicit cause-vs-recovery visibility.
primary_actions.action: Use the latest successful artifact and latest failed automation step together; only treat unrecovered failures as active blockers.

primary_actions.title: Control-plane artifacts disagree on target date or run identity
primary_actions.why: release-state, recovery, runtime, or epoch artifacts reference different target_market_date or run_id values.
primary_actions.impact: The pipeline can claim DONE or green even when downstream artifacts still describe an older or different target date.
primary_actions.action: Rebuild system-status, runtime, epoch, and release-state from the same target_market_date and run_id without manual JSON edits.

dependency_health.reason: Provider-backed v7 history refresh is the first upstream market-data hop.
Q1 delta ingest can only advance after v7 history refresh touches newer packs.
QuantLab daily report reads raw-bar freshness from the Q1 ingest layer.
Hist-probs/regime computation requires the same raw market bars to advance.
Scientific summary is sourced from stock-analysis snapshots rather than QuantLab raw bars.
Forecast batch is independent from QuantLab raw-bar freshness.
Learning report aggregates forecast/scientific/elliott source artifacts.
Breakout/snapshot combines forecast freshness with QuantLab publish layers.
The universe-wide analyze-v4 audit is only trustworthy after the direct data/model inputs and snapshot layer are current.
ETF diagnostic explains the current snapshot funnel output.
V1 audit requires current learning artifacts and snapshot outputs.
Cutover readiness is evaluated after the V1 audit is available.

market_data_refresh.label: Market Data Refresh
market_data_refresh.why: Latest v7 history refresh report was generated at 2026-04-12T18:45:46Z with observed market data only up to 2026-04-10.
market_data_refresh.next_fix: Run the provider-backed history refresh first; if it does not advance, inspect provider auth/quota and refresh report outputs before touching downstream jobs.

failure_signals: output_asof missing or older than the latest trading day
assets_fetched_with_data = 0 with output_asof null (pre-market run or quota exhaustion — re-run after market close)

q1_delta_ingest.label: Q1 Delta Ingest
q1_delta_ingest.why: Latest successful Q1 delta ingest is anchored to ingest_date=2026-04-10 and was updated at 2026-04-12T14:12:46Z.
q1_delta_ingest.next_fix: Rerun the Q1 delta ingest against the active target_market_date, then verify latest_success.json records ingest_date, selected_packs_total, noop_no_changed_packs, and a downstream QuantLab rebuild before rebuilding snapshot/UI layers.

quantlab_daily_report.label: QuantLab Daily Report
quantlab_daily_report.why: QuantLab-Marktdaten sind aktuell bis 2026-04-10; der Canonical-/Modell-Cutoff liegt bei 2026-04-10 und wird separat als advisory verfolgt.
quantlab_daily_report.next_fix: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

operational_freshness.label: aktuell
operational_freshness.message: QuantLab-Marktdaten sind aktuell bis 2026-04-10; der Canonical-/Modell-Cutoff liegt bei 2026-04-10 und wird separat als advisory verfolgt.

failure_signals: raw canonical or publish as-of lags current market

hist_probs.label: Historical Probabilities
hist_probs.why: US+EU historical profile freshness is 25790/25790 fresh, 0 stale, 0 missing; latest run asset classes=ETF,STOCK.
hist_probs.next_fix: Run the full historical-profile builder over the registry-backed stock+ETF universe, then verify run-summary coverage and regime date advance together.

failure_signals: run-summary processed count below universe target
ETF tickers not included in asset_classes

forecast_daily.label: Forecast Daily
forecast_daily.why: Forecast latest artifact was generated at 2026-04-10T08:18:04.106Z with as-of 2026-04-10.
forecast_daily.next_fix: Use scripts/forecast/run_daily.mjs as the primary batch health check and treat engine-level files as implementation detail unless run_daily fails.

scientific_summary.label: Scientific Summary
scientific_summary.next_fix: Refresh the scientific summary and verify the upstream source emits a current timestamp before the daily learning batch runs.

failure_signals: no signals and no source timestamp

learning_daily.label: Daily Learning Report
learning_daily.why: Learning report generated 2026-04-12T19:25:09.812Z with status VERSCHLECHTERUNG 🔴.
learning_daily.next_fix: Regenerate the daily learning report after forecast/scientific artifacts are current enough to support it.

snapshot.label: Best Setups Snapshot
snapshot.next_fix: Keep snapshot generation tied to explicit upstream freshness checks so QuantLab staleness cannot hide behind a fresh render timestamp.

stock_analyzer_universe_audit.label: Stock Analyzer Universe Audit
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.why: Latest audit processed 28414/28414 assets and found 0 failure families (0 critical, 0 warning) affecting 0 assets.
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.next_fix: Inspect the leading failure family in the audit artifact and execute the listed recovery steps in order.

etf_diagnostic.why: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.
etf_diagnostic.next_fix: If ETF snapshot output drops to zero again, inspect diagnostic rejection breakdown before changing gates.

diagnosis.explanation: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.

failure_signals: diagnosis code indicates rejection funnel collapse

v1_audit.label: V1 Audit
v1_audit.next_fix: Keep the audit path wired to current snapshot and learning artifacts so readiness decisions stay evidence-backed.

cutover_readiness.label: Cutover Readiness
cutover_readiness.next_fix: Do not override governance. Improve readiness by reducing fallback usage and clearing upstream freshness blockers.

snapshot.label: Best Setups Snapshot

cutover_readiness.next_fix: Do not override governance. Improve readiness by reducing fallback usage and clearing upstream freshness blockers.
